tests.title: Observability alert details context when logs are annotated with service.name returns no service summary and the service + container log categories when no params are specified
Observability alert details context when logs are annotated with service.name returns Backend log categories when service.name is specified
Observability alert details context when logs are annotated with service.name returns Backend log categories when container.id is specified
Observability alert details context when logs are annotated with service.name returns an empty service summary and container log categories for a non-existing service.name
Observability alert details context when logs are not annotated with service.name returns a single log category when no params are specified
Observability alert details context when logs are not annotated with service.name returns service summary, downstream dependencies and log categories when service.name is specified
Observability alert details context when logs are not annotated with service.name returns service summary, downstream dependencies and log categories when container.id is specified
Observability alert details context when logs are not annotated with service.name returns nothing for a non-existing container id
Observability alert details context when logs are not annotated with service.name returns an empty service summary and log categories for a non-existing service.name
Observability alert details context for AI assistant contextual insights returns nothing when no traces or logs are available
Observability alert details context for AI assistant contextual insights is not available to unauthorized users
Observability annotations API fails with a 400 bad request if data is missing
Observability annotations API fails with a 400 bad request if data is invalid
Observability annotations API completes with a 200 and the created annotation if data is complete and valid
Observability annotations API indexes the annotation
Observability annotations API returns the annotation by id
Observability annotations API deletes the annotation
Custom Threshold rule data view create a threshold rule
Custom Threshold rule data view should persist the full custom-threshold form payload
Custom Threshold rule data view should have correct data view reference before and after edit
Custom Threshold rule data view should create rule with noDataBehavior: recover
Custom Threshold rule data view should create rule with noDataBehavior: alertOnNoData
Custom Threshold rule data view should create rule with noDataBehavior: remainActive
Custom Threshold rule data view should update existing rule to add noDataBehavior parameter
Observability find annotations API can find annotations filtered by slo id
Observability find annotations API can find annotations filtered by slo instance id
Observability find annotations API can find annotations filtered by slo instance id and slo id
Metric threshold rule rule should be active
Metric threshold rule should set correct information in the alert document
Metric threshold rule should set correct action parameter: ruleType
Metric threshold rule should create rule with noDataBehavior: recover
Metric threshold rule should create rule with noDataBehavior: alertOnNoData
Metric threshold rule should create rule with noDataBehavior: remainActive
Metric threshold rule should update existing rule to add noDataBehavior parameter
